PETRONEXT MChJ — Facility Modernization Application

Company Profile:
PetroNext MChJ operates petroleum product distribution terminals.
Primary business activity: neft mahsulotlari saqlash va taqsimlash
(petroleum products storage and distribution).

Core Operations:
- Petroleum storage tanks: 1,200 tonne total capacity
- Products handled: mazut, dizel yoqilg'i, benzin (fuel oil, diesel, gasoline)
- Neft mahsulotlari distribution: 4 regional routes, 180 deliveries/month
- Petroleum product handling staff: 87 personnel

Modernization Component — Rooftop Solar Installation:
24 solar photovoltaic panels installed on the warehouse administrative
building roof. Solar panel output: 18 kWh per day.
Purpose: reduce internal electricity costs for office lighting only.
Solar energy covers approximately 3% of total facility energy needs.
Remaining 97% of energy consumed from standard national grid supply.

Financial Parameters:
Total modernization cost: 185 million UZS
Solar installation cost: 48 million UZS (26% of project scope)

No environmental certificate is applied for or planned.
Primary investment driver: operational cost reduction, not ESG compliance.
